entities.description: teenage boy, slim build, short dark hair, wearing a blue hooded raincoat, dark pants, soaked sneakers, cautious expression
small gray cat, sleek body, bright eyes, wet fur, long tail, expressive face, able to speak
narrow city alley at night, wet pavement, puddles, brick walls, dim streetlamp, heavy rain
old cardboard box under an awning, damp edges, used as a small shelter

panels.summary: Wide establishing shot of a rainy city alley at night, slick pavement reflecting the dim streetlamp, the boy in a blue raincoat walking alone through the downpour.
Medium shot from behind the boy as he pauses, hearing a faint sound from the shadows near a damp cardboard box under an awning.
Low angle close-up of the gray cat crouched beside the cardboard box, wet fur clinging to its body, bright eyes staring directly at the boy.
The boy kneels carefully in the rain, reaching one hand toward the gray cat while keeping his hood low; the cat remains alert but does not run.
Dramatic close-up of the cat lifting its head and speaking, raindrops sparkling on its whiskers; the boy freezes in shock in the background.
Reaction panel: the boy stumbles backward into a puddle, eyes wide, raincoat hood slipping back; the cat sits calmly in the foreground.
The cat steps closer with a serious expression, tail raised, while the boy crouches again, still shocked but listening beneath the rain.
Dynamic panel of the gray cat darting down the narrow alley, the boy running after it through puddles, rain streaks cutting across the scene.
Final panel: under the dim streetlamp, the boy and the gray cat stand side by side at the alley’s deeper entrance, facing an unseen mystery in the rainy darkness.

text.content: 那个雨夜，一切开始改变。
